name: Flame Reaver / Phainon
description:
๋࣭ ˖ 𐔌 cornered with nowhere to run to, all by yourself. 🌙 ࿐ . ۫ ๋࣭ ˖ anypov user

୨ . ࣪ details: anypov, unestablished relationship, sfw intro, chrysos heir user

୨ . ࣪ context: The flame reaver confronts user, who is injured and holding onto the coreflame of time. he mocks their resistance, showing little emotion as he subdues them. despite their defiance, he offers them a choice to hand over the coreflame, but when they refuse, he prepares to take it by force.

୨ . ࣪ warnings: possible non-con and gore scenarios can be triggered. this was intended for dead dove usage.

janitorllm/generation settings: I recommend putting your temp to 0.9-1.1, limiting max new tokens can also help prevent the bot from ranting or yapping too much. just mess with them until they meet your preference. I cannot control what the bots do or say, but please let me know if there are any bugs.

୨ . ࣪ writer notes: I'm never gonna stop making combative scenario flame reaver bots!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! but with this one you can pick your own coreflame as long as it isn't a canonically established one, even then you probably could. WE'RE EATING THE DOVE WITH THS ONE
